layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with full-width footer. The slide uses a side-by-side arrangement with two equal-width content columns occupying the upper 75% of the slide body, followed by a full-width footer bar at the bottom. Each column is a self-contained vertical section with an icon badge, section header, subtitle, and bullet list. The layout follows a clean, structured grid with consistent alignment across both columns. All elements snap to a 2-column × 3-row grid (columns = 50% width each, rows = header zone 20%, body zone 55%, footer zone 10%). Generous padding surrounds all content. The design emphasizes visual hierarchy through colored header treatments and dashed separator lines between bullet items.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.45, 0.45, 0.1]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Technology Platform): Left column occupying 50% of slide width, positioned from left edge. Contains: (1) Icon badge at top — small filled circle with brand primary color, white icon centered inside, positioned left-aligned with small top margin. (2) Section header 'TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM' — brand primary color, bold, all-caps or title case, left-aligned, positioned directly below icon with small vertical gap. (3) Subtitle 'Cryptocurrency Analytics Capabilities' — body font, regular weight, brand text color, italic, left-aligned, positioned directly below section header with minimal gap. (4) Bullet list with 6 items — each bullet replaced with small brand primary color circle marker, body font size, brand text color, left-aligned with small left inset from circle markers. Bullet items distributed evenly across remaining vertical space within the column using flexGrow. Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines between each bullet item (not after the last item), spanning from left edge of text to right edge of column. Column background: white or transparent. No border or container box around the column. Content-aware spacing: moderate padding between elements, as content density is medium (6 bullets, short text per bullet).
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — Capacity Building): Right column occupying 50% of slide width, positioned from horizontal midpoint to right edge. Identical structural treatment to LEFT COLUMN. Contains: (1) Icon badge at top — small filled circle with brand accent color (or alternating brand color if design uses alternating pattern), white icon centered inside, positioned left-aligned with small top margin. (2) Section header 'CAPACITY BUILDING' — brand accent color (or same as left column for consistency), bold, all-caps or title case, left-aligned, positioned directly below icon with small vertical gap. (3) Subtitle 'Training & Knowledge Transfer' — body font, regular weight, brand text color, italic, left-aligned, positioned directly below section header with minimal gap. (4) Bullet list with 6 items — each bullet replaced with small brand accent color circle marker (matching header color), body font size, brand text color, left-aligned with small left inset from circle markers. Bullet items distributed evenly across remaining vertical space within the column using flexGrow, with identical flexGrow values to LEFT COLUMN so all row boundaries align horizontally across both columns. Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines between each bullet item (not after the last item), positioned at exactly the same vertical positions as the separators in LEFT COLUMN, spanning from left edge of text to right edge of column. Column background: white or transparent. No border or container box around the column. Top and bottom edges of this column must align exactly with LEFT COLUMN.
  C2 (FULL-WIDTH FOOTER BAR): Full-width footer bar spanning 100% of slide width, positioned at the bottom of the slide with a visible gap above the two columns. Height: compact — just enough to contain the text with small top and bottom padding (approximately 10% of slide height). Fill: brand accent color or brand primary color (choose the color that provides best contrast and visual balance with the column headers above). No border. Corners: slightly rounded (soft, not sharp). Text: 'Log-term partnerships including support training and ability to adapt and provide solutions to emerging needs' — white, body font, regular or semi-bold weight, horizontally centered, vertically centered within the bar. Text wraps to 2 lines if necessary to fit comfortably within the bar width with appropriate side padding. This footer serves as a visual anchor and summary statement for the entire slide.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): INACTIVE. The slide is well-filled by the two content columns and footer bar. No additional decorative background layer is needed. The white slide background provides sufficient contrast and the content containers carry the visual weight.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): INACTIVE. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are needed for this layout. The two columns are visually independent and the footer is a separate full-width element. No arrows or connecting lines span between containers.

_reference_violations.description: C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Technology Platform): text block occupies approximately 30-35% of container inner height. The bullet list ends around the vertical midpoint of the container, leaving more than half the container as empty space below the last bullet item. This is severely under-filled.

C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — Capacity Building): text block occupies approximately 30-35% of container inner height. The bullet list ends around the vertical midpoint of the container, leaving more than half the container as empty space below the last bullet item. This is severely under-filled.

_reference_critique: C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Technology Platform) and C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — Capacity Building): Both containers are severely under-filled. The text blocks (header + subtitle + 6 bullets) occupy only ~30-35% of each container's inner height, leaving more than half of each container as empty space below the last bullet item. SVGSketcher must increase the body font size for the bullet list items from the current size (appears to be ~14-16pt) toward the 18pt ceiling until the text content fills at least 65% of the container inner height. Additionally, increase vertical spacing (line-height and gap between bullet items) proportionally to distribute the content more evenly across the available vertical space. The section headers and subtitles should also be scaled up slightly to maintain visual hierarchy. Apply identical font sizes and spacing to both C0 and C1 to preserve within-slide uniformity (C6). The dashed separator lines between bullets should remain but be repositioned to reflect the new spacing.
